programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Lord of the Rings

After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film deemed by many to be impossible. But just as things start to come together an infamous media mogul throws a wrench in the works.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: With the clock ticking Peter Jackson has to find a studio to save his work in progress. Only one studio is willing to take the gamble on three films made at once adapting an unwanted property led by an unproven director on the other side of the world. As filming gets started, one of the cast drops out. With everything on the line, can they pull it off?

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Winterfell legend Maisie Williams battles the (vegan) wings of death and discusses everything from appearing on Binging with Babish to "Game of Thrones" myths and that time Drake shouted her out at the Billboard Music Awards.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Logic Solves a Rubik's Cube While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The hyper-talented emcee Logic battles through the wings of death, discussing his relationship with Neil deGrasse Tyson and challenging Vince Staples to a PlayStation showdown along the way.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Gabriel Iglesias Feels Cursed by Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Comedian Gabriel Iglesias is BACK for a very special "Hot Ones" reunion. He is coming off a historic sold-out performance at Dodgers Stadium and has his own sitcom streaming on Netflix.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Casey Neistat Melts His Face Off While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Over the years, Casey Neistat's pulled some insane stunts on his channel, from hanging out of helicopters to skateboarding behind a Lamborghini. Casey and Sean Evans go sauce for sauce, diving into the state of media and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: T-Pain Tastes Gas While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The gregarious crooner and beloved "Hot Ones" legend T-Pain slams flats and drums while discussing his cartoon Mount Rushmore, his triumph on the "Masked Singer" and much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Steve-O Tells Insane Stories While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: "Jackass" star Steve-O battles the likes of Dirty Dick's and Blair's Mega Death Sauce with Sean Evans on this highly anticipated episode.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Jon Bernthal Gets Punished By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Jon Bernthal is an actor starring in TV shows like "The Walking Dead," but how is he with spicy food?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Ed Sheeran Tries to Avoid Failure While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Ed Sheeran takes on the wings of death and chats about everything from salvaging Eric Clapton's guitar from a fire to collaborating with Eminem and 50 Cent.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Chili Klaus Faces the Most Extreme "Hot Ones" Ever
programme.desc: Sean Evans and Chili Klaus have joined forces to eat the world's hottest pepper, the Carolina Reaper.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Colin Farrell Searches for Meaning in the Pain of Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Hollywood vet Colin Farrell tackles the spice as he discusses upcoming projects, including The Batman.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Shawn Mendes Reveals a New Side of Himself While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the 19-year-old pop phenom reps his Canadian roots while taking on the wings of death. Along the scorched road, Mendes addresses everything from Justin Bieber's hockey skills to guitar store etiquette.

programme.title: Ria Lina: Rebellion
programme.desc: Following her killer debut tour last year, the 'fearless, provocative, and very funny' Ria Lina (Scotsman) realises that she is ready to rebel. Named by the Evening Standard as one of the Hottest Comedians You Should Be Watching Now, expect a relentless stream of hilarity as Ria explores the delight of throwing life up in the air after years of following the rules.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: "Good Witch" will take viewers on a new magical journey with Cassie Nightingale and her daughter Grace. When Dr. Sam Radford moves in next door to Grey House with his son, they are charmed by the 'magical' mother-daughter duo.

programme.title: Alison Spittle: Big
programme.desc: A man told Alison to sit down and now she's doing a whole stand up show about it. Appeared on House of Games, Celebrity Goggle Box and Pointless Celebrities. Podcast appearances on Off menu, The Gargle and Trusty Hogs.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: As Astrid (Meaghan Rath) and her sister (Nazneen Contractor) try to discover what their mom (Veena Sood) is hiding from them, James (Aaron Abrams) recruits family members to help pitch a questionable new product at work.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated and overwhelmed, Astrid's mom (Veena Sood) announces her retirement from being default babysitter, while an opportunity at James' (Aaron Abrams) work causes a rift between their kids.

programme.title: Count Arthur Strong
programme.desc: The cafe crowd is barricaded into the store room while a riot takes place out in the streets.

programme.title: Not Another Happy Ending
programme.desc: When struggling publisher Tom Duval discovers his only successful author, Jane Lockhart, has writer's block, he knows he has to fix the problem.

programme.title: 12-Year-Old Knocks Out A Pro Fighter
programme.desc: After his mother abandons him to reform school, young Mike Tyson is discovered by trainer Cus D'Amato. Cus and Camille provide a stable home, transforming the troubled teen into a boxing champion.

programme.title: Teen Gives Hair Lice To The Whole School
programme.desc: After Andrew is bullied for a lice outbreak, rich kid Ricky posts a mocking video. Andrew mentors Ricky's sister in art, prompting a change of heart. Ricky repents, and the families bond as friends.

programme.title: Family Kicked Off Airplane For Fighting
programme.desc: After constant bickering ruins their trip, adopted foster kid Georgie runs away. His family finds his scrapbook about his past trauma, prompting them to reconcile and prove they can be a real home.

programme.title: Regular Teen Is Overnight Famous Star
programme.desc: David's daughter Aveline is a star held captive by her abusive manager Vivian. With help from allies, Aveline escapes. Vivian is arrested after Aveline's mother confesses to their past conspiracy.

programme.title: Mom Secretly Cyberbullies Her Daughter
programme.desc: To boost Kaylin's fame, her stepmother Chelsea frames rival Brynn for leaks. Ryan discovers Chelsea killed their dad for money and now wants Kaylin dead. Ryan stops the hitman, and Chelsea is arrested.

programme.title: Nerdy Girl Risks Expulsion For Popularity
programme.desc: After tech-nerd Lyla steals Ozempic from her mom's clinic, she becomes popular by selling it at school. Her brother Howie exposes the scheme after his sister is hospitalized by the drug's dangers.

programme.title: Orphan Boy Secretly Sleeps In School
programme.desc: Homeless teen Mark lives in his school locker to protect his late sister's mural. He uncovers a plot to sell the school, exposes the villains with his teacher's help, and is eventually adopted.

programme.title: Adopted Kids Survive World's Worst Foster Mom
programme.desc: Mayoral candidate Valarie fakes being a loving foster mom while abusing kids in her basement. Reporter Jake exposes her human trafficking past. The FBI arrests her, and foster sister Kathy saves them.

programme.title: 13-Year-Old Robs Bank for Vision Pro
programme.desc: Mikey disguises himself as his dad to steal his college fund for an Apple Vision Pro. His mom stages a fake arrest to teach him that bad choices always lead to even worse consequences.

programme.title: Poor Girl Is Shamed for Cheap Gifts

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Agree to Disagree: Episode 44

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: AGREE TO DISAGREE
programme.desc: Ahead of Tottenham Hotspur against Liverpool, ‪Expressions‬ tells Laurence McKenna why he thinks Mo Salah is overrated and why he thinks Arne Slot will be sacked before Thomas Frank. The two argue over some of the biggest debates between the teams.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this episode, Man City fan Big Steve goes up against the don of AFTV, Robbie Lyle. Will Man City ever be as big as Arsenal? Would any Arsenal players make it into Man City's team? Did Man City buy their success?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Zoe Saldaña tackle some of our audience's biggest debates by arguing whether Janice from Friends was as annoying as we all thought and whether you should grab dinner on a first date.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Andreas Christopheros shares how he survived a life-changing attack, opening up on recovery, resilience and rebuilding his life, from the moment it happened to the years of treatment and strength that followed.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former New Scotland Yard detective Steve Keogh reveals what it takes to solve a murder, sharing insights from 30 years in policing, from crime scenes to counter-terrorism and the emotional reality of major investigations.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we hear from the remarkable Sosa Henkoma who survived being groomed by a South East London drugs gang as a child. To escape abuse at home, Sosa ran away and was first introduced to county lines drug dealing as an 11-year-old. He found himself at the centre of a war between two rival gangs, that led to him being shot, stabbed and ironed on the chest as a young teenager. After years of brutal gang violence, Sosa finally received support as a survivor of child trafficking and grooming. He now uses his voice to help young people and educate law enforcement on preventing grooming and child exploitation.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sit down with Sebastian Junger, a renowned journalist and filmmaker who has spent over 20 years documenting life on the front lines in war zones. Sebastian shares stories from his career in Bosnia, Afghanistan, and Liberia, recounting the most shocking events he's witnessed and delving into the ethical dilemmas faced by war journalists. He also reflects on the profound impact of a near-death experience he had in 2020, offering insights into how it has reshaped his perspective on life and work.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former armed robber Adam Muganzi describes having a £100k bounty placed on his head by a drug kingpin, experiencing night-time police raids, and how he turned his life around after spending 10 years in prison.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Chris Fuller, a former British Army Bomb Disposal Officer, who now does humanitarian work in the Middle East, talks to us about defusing bombs in the centre of London, and the difference between working in the UK and abroad.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Paul Page used to work as a royal protection officer, providing security to the members of the Royal family. Here, he tells us the biggest security threat to the Royals and why Prince Andrew was the most difficult and unpleasant to deal with.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Pam Fraser, a nudist, who tells us all about the advantages of living a naked life.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Comedians James Acaster and Ed Gamble, the hosts of the brilliant Off Menu podcast, enjoy a battle of Posh vs Normal food, and take a real trip down memory lane with some iconic British snacks. The results are hilarious! Florence Pugh compares American and British snacks and explains why she loves Branston Pickle so much, gets nostalgic drinking Ribena, and has a great time playing the BeanBoozled Jelly Belly game and eating some disgusting flavours!

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.14
programme.desc: Hyun Soo tells Jung Sun that she wants to live with him. Joon Ha and Hong Ah have a hard time working together on Hong Ah's drama. Jung Sun confronts Jung Woo for lending his mother money. Meanwhile, both Jung Woo and Jung Sun reminisce of the good times they had together when they first opened the restaurant. Jung Sun decides that he will work to receive a Michelin star. The staff at Good Soup work together to achieve that goal. Jung Sun tells Hyun Soo that he doesn't want her to contact his mother. She tells him that she can't do that. Meanwhile, Jung Woo meets with Hyun Soo mom, Mi Na.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.15
programme.desc: Jung Sun meets Jung Woo to talk about paying back his mom's debt. On his way home, he gets a call from his father. Hyun Soo comes to Good Soup to interview him for her drama. Hyun Soo continues to feel as though Jung Sun isn't letting her in. Meanwhile, Hong Ah and Yi Bok prepare for Hong Ah's drama.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.16
programme.desc: Jung Sun leaves the hospital after seeing Jung Woo with Hyun Soo's family. Mi Na goes into surgery. Joon Ha continues to show his affection towards Kyung. Jung Sun goes to the hospital to visit Mi Na after the surgery. Hyun Soo tells Jung Sun that she has been careful around him since he rejected her offer to live with each other.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.17
programme.desc: Jung Woo tells Hyun Soo's parents that he liked Hyun Soo. Jung Sun proposes to Hyun Soo. Joon Ha tells Hyun Soo that the program set to air before her drama has been canceled and that their drama will be pushed forward. Hong Ah gets upset at Jung Woo that Hyun Soo's drama will air before hers. Meanwhile, Jung Sun hears from Michelin.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.18
programme.desc: Hyun Soo and Jung Sun meet and get back together. Jung Sun decides to stay in Korea and not leave for Hong Kong. After turning her phone off, Hyun Soo spends the night at Jung Sun's place. Kyung is worried about her and calls Jung Woo for help. He goes to their home, and Hyun Soo walks in.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.19
programme.desc: Jung Sun and Jung Woo meet to settle their debt. Jung Woo admits defeat and tells Jung Sun that Hyun Soo was never faltered no matter how hard he tried to sway her. The notoriously mean blogger comes back to Good Soup. Mi Na calls Good Soup to make an appointment to meet with Jung Sun. Hong Ah admits to Hyun Soo that she might be in love with Won Joon.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.20
programme.desc: Hyun Soo realizes that the love that Jung Sun and she share is not destiny. Rather, they chose to have the other in their lives. Jung Sun meets with his mom, Young Mi, to ask her if she's serious about opening up a flower shop. He tells her to take charge of the flower arrangements for Good Soup so that he can decide whether or not to invest in her.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.11
programme.desc: While the unit is still in turmoil over the grievance letter, the Company Commander exposes the truth behind it in front of all personnel. Finding the Commander's words hard to accept, Cha Hoon argues back on behalf of the senior soldiers, but the Commander—claiming they show no signs of remorse—orders every corporal and sergeant to assemble on the parade ground. Just as everyone is reluctantly bracing for a mass punishment, the First Sergeant steps in to block the Commander's path.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.12
programme.desc: The Company Commander goes on a rampage following his friction with the First Sergeant. Before long, he issues an absurd order for all soldiers to remain in full battle rattle, including full camouflage face paint, during all daily duties and rest periods. Meanwhile, while on sentry duty, Min-seok and Dong-woo spot a military jeep pulling into the unit. The person stepping out of the vehicle is... the Regimental Commander?!

programme.title: Namib Ep.1
programme.desc: After gathering the courage to take the stage once more, Yoo Jin-woo finally achieves a triumphant success. In the wake of his rise, Soo-hyun receives a lucrative offer from the industry's top agency, which is eager to recruit Jin-woo and bring him into their elite roster.

programme.title: Namib Ep.2
programme.desc: After a fierce tug-of-war with Hyun-chul over control of Yoo Jin-woo, Soo-hyun finally manages to bring him back against all odds. In a fit of rage, the defeated Hyun-chul begins orchestrating a sinister plot to frame Jin-woo for a drug-related crime.

programme.title: Namib Ep.3
programme.desc: Soo-hyun finds herself powerless as the negative public sentiment surrounding Yoo Jin-woo spreads like wildfire. Amidst the mounting pressure, Jin-woo's new agency organizes a press conference, forcing him to face the cameras and the public's scrutiny all on his own.

programme.title: Namib Ep.4
programme.desc: After parting ways with Soo-hyun, Yoo Jin-woo secures a spot in an idol debut lineup and becomes the center of a massive media buzz. However, in a desperate move to cover up the burgeoning Star Rise controversy, Hyun-chul tips off the press about Jin-woo's dark past.

programme.title: Namib Ep.5
programme.desc: During the live broadcast, Yoo Jin-woo deviates from the planned competition track to perform a song filled with shared memories of Soo-hyun. While a major agency comes forward with an offer to scout Jin-woo, Jun-seok tries to persuade Soo-hyun not to let him go, challenging her original plan.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.26
programme.desc: As Jeongi and Yukdo face off in a decisive competition, all eyes at the Bunwon are fixed on the outcome. Thrilled at the prospect of becoming nangcheong, Yukdo is confident of victory. Jeongi asks Hwa-ryeong to procure the white clay needed for the contest, while Hwa-ryeong urges Yukdo to defeat Jeongi at all costs. When the medicine bowls are completed, Jeongi and Yukdo anxiously await Prince Shinseong's judgment—until the prince suddenly collapses after drinking from the bowl.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.27
programme.desc: Jeongi confronts Gangcheon, demanding that he reveal the truth about Euldam, but his shameless willingness to offer a false confession only fuels her anger. Gwanghae vows before King Seonjo to uncover not only the truth behind the current 사건 but also the events of the previous nangcheong competition. A royal order is issued for Yukdo's execution, and a grief-stricken Gangcheon kneels before the palace gates in penitence.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.28
programme.desc: Mun Saseung is appointed as the new nangcheong of the Bunwon, and Jeongi becomes the first female master potter in Joseon history. Seeing Jeongi clad in her official potter's robes, Gwanghae smiles with pride and gifts her the workshop once used by Euldam. Reduced to desperation, Gangcheon and Yukdo beg Mun Saseung to allow them to remain at the Bunwon. Elsewhere, at the request of a Japanese merchant, Hwa-ryeong summons Jeongi—hinting at new trials yet to come.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.29
programme.desc: To protect Jeongi, Gwanghae arranges for a personal guard to stay by her side. When pigments needed for overglaze painting run short, Mun Saseung turns to Hwa-ryeong for supplies—drawing Gangcheon straight to her. Thanks to Jeongi's foresight in testing Gangcheon's scheme in advance, Mun Saseung successfully completes the tribute porcelain. Enraged by his failure, Gangcheon orders Mapung to kill Jeongi.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.30
programme.desc: After hearing the full truth from Mapung, Jeongi breaks down in tears before Mun Saseung, who is left stunned and shaken. Jeongi then pleads with Gwanghae to delay Gangcheon's arrest just a little longer. Confronting Gangcheon herself, Jeongi is devastated once more when he coldly declares that Yukdo is the only bloodline he acknowledges. Claiming he wishes to atone, Gangcheon summons Jeongi to Euldam's grave.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.31
programme.desc: Tailing Hwa-ryeong's men from the merchant guild, Taedo discovers the kiln where Jeongi is being held. Seizing a brief opening as soldiers pass by, he rescues Jeongi and flees with her—only to be struck by a throwing blade. Face to face with Gangcheon, Jeongi unleashes her fury, declaring that she can never forgive him for being her father. Steeling her resolve, Jeongi immerses herself in the potter's wheel and presents the finished vessel to King Seonjo.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.32
programme.desc: With the Bunwon seized by Japanese forces, Jeongi attempts to slip away to meet Gwanghae but is captured by Gangcheon. After learning the full truth from Mun Saseung, Yukdo agonizes over his choice—then ultimately releases Jeongi. Trusting that Gwanghae will drive the invaders away, Jeongi returns to the Bunwon and waits for his promise to be fulfilled.

programme.desc: This is a story of one man's obsession to find a lost Spanish Galleon loaded with treasure. He risked everything – and faced terrible personal tragedy in his quest.

programme.title: The Nazis and the Book of Power
programme.desc: In 1944 Italy, SS soldiers raid an Italian Count's villa under Himmler's orders to find the Germania, an ancient manuscript by Tacitus. Himmler idealized it as the "Book of Power" to prove Aryan superiority, justifying Nazi atrocities.

programme.title: The Curse of Montezumas Gold

programme.title: The Dangers of EMF (Electro Magnetic Frequencies)
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: Past Life Regression
programme.desc: An investigation into the practice of past-life regression therapy a technique where subjects are placed under hypnosis in order to recover memories of supposed past lives.

programme.title: Bible Codes

programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the medical profession, drug companies, the food industry and government agencies are suppressing a cure for cancer.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: If There Was No Land On Earth
programme.desc: A mesmerizing journey on the border of two amazing worlds - beyond the turquoise waters of Raja Ampat, a paradise of diverse coral gardens, multitudes of fascinating species of fish and towering barrel sponges and up on the land where the unique cultures and ways of life, as well as struggles and triumphs of the people who call this remote and stunning corner of the world home are shown.

programme.title: If There Was No Land On Earth
programme.desc: Discover the breathtaking beauty of the Wayag archipelago and its underwater wonders. From vibrant coral gardens to a diverse array of marine creatures, immerse yourself in the mesmerizing world beneath the surface. Discover how the beautiful pearls are made and meet the dedicated people behind the process. Witness the silky shark's grace and agility in its underwater habitat and learn about the bamboo shark's unique characteristics and behaviors.

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: The East Auckland current warms the waters around the world-renowned Poor Knights Islands, creating an astonishing environment. Caves and arches hold the only known congregation of stingrays which stack themselves between underwater walls. Demoiselles and Black Angelfish fathers protect their eggs with determination, and must keep a watchful eye on neighbors who will raid their nests in an instant! When disaster strikes and the male Sandagers Wrasse disappears, one of the harem of females undergoes a sex change to pick up the missing male's responsibilities. On land, the Tuatara and Giant Weta fuel an ancient feud, while Gannets rest for their next attack.

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: Hannah Emde meets one of Africa's most experienced elephant trackers: Hendrick Munembome, the Director of Elephant Human Relations Aid (EHRA).

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: The poaching of rhinos for their horn has brought these animals to the brink of extinction. Namibia's black rhinos are hard to find. The Save The Rhino Trust has been fighting for the protection of the pachyderms every day for 30 years under the most adverse conditions

programme.title: Wild and Alive
programme.desc: Five critically endangered African species find protection in one modest haven - De Hoop Nature reserve is not only a World heritage Site its's also incredibly important for the survival of these iconic animal.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: In a land of dangers, plant-eating animals are always at risk, and never more so than at the time of their birth out on the open they are vulnerable and there are few places to hide. But luckily some are born to run …

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: It's a water world and life couldn't survive without it. And thanks to it, a mind blowing diversity of creatures thrive beneath the surface. Born to enjoy the riches underwater they must master their body's adaptations, learn to find food, to escape danger and above all become expert swimmers! Whether it's in rivers, on beaches or in the deep ocean, all must overcome the obstacles and fulfil their destiny, all are born to swim! Of all the habitats on earth, the ocean is perhaps the most challenging. Here salt, temperatures, currents and predators can make life difficult it's not an obvious place to want to bring up your babies… But even in these waters generation after generation beats the odds. They have overcome the challenges and become some of the most beautiful and graceful of creatures. But any baby born to swim has a lot to learn… All over the world there are creatures born to swim, and though humans are not, we seem determined to join them. Perhaps we are envious of their grace. Maybe we are all water babies at heart

programme.title: Wild Faces of the Andes
programme.desc: The Andes are the biggest mountain range in the world. Peaks of up to 7000 metres in height, do not only offer an imposing view, but also influence the climate by being the drainage and meteorological divide.

programme.title: The Last Paradises: Patagonia
programme.desc: On the wild coast of Patagonia, the nature calendar describes the most diverse visiting times of fascinating animals, from the southern right whale and other large whales, via the sea lions and elephant seals up to the orcas and millions of penguins. The encounters with whales and their babies are spectacular. Hardly anywhere else on earth can one experience both the brutal and the delightful sides of nature so vividly and so close. The trip to the hot spots for animal watchers and researchers leads us inter alia to the Caleta Valdez. This is where, during the mating season, the southern elephant seals bring their babies into the world, mate and enjoy a little sunbathing on the beach.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East

programme.title: To the South
programme.desc: At the first part of his journey, the photographer is lucky to get some shots of rare animal species. Between the gaps of the rocky mountains he traces funny creatures: Pica. They look like a mixture between hamsters and rabbits. From his hideout Benny Rebel manages to observe impressive Ibexes, a kind of wild goats with huge horns. Equipped with a special microcopter and night shot camera traps he tries to get a sneak into the life of shy inhabitants of the steppe. In his adventure he encounters lonesome dromedary herds and discovers a spooky cave of hyenas. Rebel witnesses owls, snakes and lizards living between the antique ruins of the old Persian capital Persepolis. Benny Rebel also is interested in the relationship between men and nature. He meets not only ranger in the wild, but also visitors of the magnificent Persian gardens in the middle of rough deserts. Between the fountains of freshly sputtering water pelicans take a bath. Young and old people walk in the green paradises in front of attractive mosques. Unexpected the 43 year old photographer meets animal lovers on the roof tops of urban houses. The bet on the flying skills of their specific breed of pigeons. And like a house from a fairy tale seem the historical pigeon towers with their unique architecture housing more than ten thousands of birds. Finally Benny Rebel traces an Asiatic cheetah in the semi desert. Less than a hundred of the big cats are left in the wild. The nature conservationist and photographer decides to come closer to the dangerous carnivore.

programme.title: Paseka: The Easter Elephant
programme.desc: On Easter morning, a baby elephant is mysteriously abandoned by her herd in the wilds of Botswana's Okavango Delta. programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: Ask a Local
programme.desc: From beaches to bike trails to breweries, the United States has something for everyone to explore. Hear from the locals themselves and discover the best places to eat, shop, play, and more.

programme.title: Amazing Iran
programme.desc: For the Iranian Turkmen a wedding is one of most important social events in their culture and is still celebrated according to old nomadic tradition. The Turkmen Steppe, the country of a thousand mountains, is a tribute to the hidden treasure that is Iran. Home to a proud nation with a majestic history, we show the freedom of a nomadic life, encounter the wild nature of the people and discover old traditions like the Turkmen wedding. Breathtaking sceneries create a mysticism that transports viewers into the realm of divinity while exposing a world caught between tradition and modernity - nomadism and sedentarism. Weddings in Iran are primarily arrangements between families and the product of lengthy negotiations. Even though many customs are purely symbolic, they still reflect the great significance as a rite of transition for the newlyweds and their families. The life of the Turkmen housewife revolves around weddings – first her own, later those of her children. Raising healthy, capable daughters and sons searching for possible partners mediating contact negotiating each betrothal with the family of the intended shouldering the wedding arrangements and the observance of customs and traditions – the responsibility for all of that falls to the mother. Though the Turkmen daughters and sons of today do insist on having their say, love, affection, trust and the like are still not the decisive criteria in making a match. The main consideration is not the subjective happiness of the couple but the happiness, stability and honor of each of their families as a whole. So it is still not uncommon for the bride and groom to be virtual strangers on their wedding day. The nuptials as a ritual of transition mark a series of profound changes – especially in the life of the bride. Once married, she leaves her family and her home village to take her new place within the family of the groom.

programme.title: Amazing Isfahan
programme.sub-title: Paradise in the Heart of Iran
programme.desc: Take a look at this natural beauty. Isfahan – the Florence of Persia, the blue pearl of Iran. The city in the heart of Iran is the most charismatic city in the country and often uttered in the same breath as Bagdad, Constantinople or Cairo. The former capital of the Persian Safavid Empire has long since lost the status of cosmopolitan city, but it still radiates a cosmopolitan charm of which the inhabitants are extremely proud. With its Iranian and Persian national consciousness, Isfahan emits a form of comeliness that attracts people near and far. Following the 30-year-old carpet dealer Shanty as he tries to establish a business for himself and his fiancée Nina, we discover the soul of the city with mesmeric shots, intimate portraits and true to life portrayals of daily life. For 120 years his family has been dealing with noble Persian carpets, but Shanty dreams of a modern coffee shop, driven by a youthful eagerness to experiment and with passion for the new. In the cozy little espresso bar on the city's famous Imam Square Shanty's barista conjures up the best créma in Isfahan while Pink Floyd, The Grateful Death and Led Zeppelin boom from the loudspeakers nothing new in Berlin or Paris but almost revolutionary here. In intimate pictures, we accompany the youngest son of an old Isfahan family through his bulging everyday life and see how many young Iranians try to unite the culture and traditions of their country with the present.

programme.title: Berlin from Above
programme.desc: Unique pictures from above. This documentary shows a different angle of people and country, during a glide flight above the metropolis. More than 25 years after the reunion between East and West Germany, this movie shows pictures from different perspectives. Which visions and dreams marked this region? What changed and what emerged in Germany's tensed city. We take a look from above to see the city and its citizens. Due to high quality flight recordings and panorama pictures, we are able to see how the people make this area their home. The movie unites nature, urbanity, tranquility and the rush of a metropolis. It unites parks and skyscraper canyons, lake capes and wetlands, curvy courses of rivers and straight streets. With exhilarating pictures we take a trip through Berlin- from sunrise til sunset. Due to high quality flight recordings and panorama pictures, we are able to get a glimpse at how the people make this area their home.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We're here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you're in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po fetches the other to watch Andy Brown and two children look for some rabbits. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky is looking for Po. He looks for her everywhere, but she is hiding from him. When he finds her all the Tubbies dance a happy dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
