programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal underground.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice to convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Conscrash lands on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The children join the Autobot team and head out on their first mission to find a newly waking minicon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The next minicon alert is from Antarctica. Starscream retrieves the minicon, but has it stolen from him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 3
programme.desc: The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Presumed to be defeated, the Decepticons have returned!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells: When Scruple, helper to the evil Gargamel, finds the Great Book of Spells in his master's cellar, he asks for the power to be the world's most powerful wizard. This means trouble for the poor little Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Snappy's Way
programme.desc: Did you know that if you catch a troll, he may grant you one wish? It just happens that Aloysius the Troll gets caught in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. Snappy Smurf sets him free and as a reward, gets to make all other Smurfs obey his every whim. Now this brings a lot of trouble to the Smurfs, as Smurflings, sometimes, ask for things that are not good for them... or anybody else.

programme.title: Don Smurfo
programme.desc: Everyone has their own dreams. That of Smurfette is to meet the legendary Don Smurfo, the dashing, witty, swashbuckling hero of many an engrossing tale. The Smurfs shrug at this infatuation. But when a real-life Don Smurfo appears in the village and Smurfette snubs them all in favor of the bragging stranger, they take the matter a little more seriously.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs That Time Forgot: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: S3 Quest Mode Bwah
programme.desc: Epic missions and wild challenges push Rabbids into full quest mode.

programme.title: S3 Creature Chaos 2.0
programme.desc: Beasts, bugs and bizarre critters spark nonstop Rabbid mayhem.

programme.title: S3 Quest Mode Bwah
programme.desc: Epic missions and wild challenges push Rabbids into full quest mode.

programme.title: S1 Bwah‑ginnings
programme.desc: The Rabbids unleash their very first wave of chaos, kicking off nonstop mischief.

programme.title: S1 Summer Bwah‑cation
programme.desc: Sun, sand and total silliness as Rabbids turn summer into pure mayhe

programme.title: S1 Tech‑Tastrophe Rabbids
programme.desc: Gadgets glitch, machines revolt and Rabbids make every device go BWAH.

programme.title: S1 Lab Test Bwah‑nanza
programme.desc: Experiments explode into chaos as Rabbids turn science into slapstick.

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: Sabre-Toothed Bear
programme.desc: Everyone is curious to know more details about their ancestors: what they were like, what did they do… Once upon a time the Bear took an interest in how his progenitor Bear could look like. In order to answer this question the Bear has to invent and build…guess what? - a real time machine! And, of course, Masha could not miss such a discovery!

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: Call Me Please!
programme.desc: A funny interpretation of an old fable about a boy who called for help and shouted “Wolves!”. The Bear wants to watch a soccer game but first he needs to get rid of the girl. The Bear sends her foe a walk to the forest and gave her a cell phone in order to be safe. As a result Masha annoys him with her calls for any trivial reasons and when she finds herself in real danger, the Bear doesn't answer the phone …

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Grim Testament About One Snotty Boy
programme.desc: Have you ever heard that the world around is full terrible plagues and diseases? One boy called Semushka knows it for sure! Wherever he threw a glance – he seemed to see tetanus, rubella and other kinds of chickenpoxes…The poor boy was so terrified that began to squish his nose even harder. The only saving measures was an aid kit which his grandmother has put in his backpack “just in case” and a little spacesuit…Basically…this grim “testament” about such a snotty boy came out to be the most educative one!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?!

programme.title: Panic Unbearable Legend About Insects
programme.desc: Once there was a girl called Anya who was very scared of insects! One day Anya's mother asked her to help around the house but in everything she did, Anya was haunted by spiders and all kinds of midges! She was on the edge of despair when her little brother proved to her, that little crumbs can't be of any danger to giants like children!

programme.title: Happy New Year… Again!
programme.desc: Masha decides celebrating New Year once is not enough and goes to mysterious China, where dragons dance, gardens bloom and many, many more interesting things are happening!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: A Hedgehog's Home Is Her Castle
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic saves a damsel in distress, and falls in love with her, not knowing she's a robot built by Robotnik. But when she has a chance to trap him, she helps him escape, realizing she has fallen for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: In order to free Sketch Lampoon (a satirical comic book artist) from Robotnik's new high security prison, Sonic allows himself to be captured, then makes a high speed rescue and escape.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: On their way back to Pallet Town, our heroes encounter a runaway Mr. Mime.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: At a fork in the road, our heroes decide to climb a snowy mountain.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has a run-in with Gary at Professor Oak's lab in Pallet Town.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: On a tropical island, Ash looks for answers about how Slowpoke evolves.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Can Ash and Pikachu give a surfer the confidence he needs to catch a giant wave?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Back in Pallet Town, Ash and friends meet a Trainer whose Gloom won't evolve.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A famous director comes to town, and everybody wants to be a movie star.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Meowth shares the heartbreaking story of his life before Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Searching for Bruno of the Elite Four, our heroes discover a land of giant Onix.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes uncover a hidden temple—could it be the ancient city of Pokémopolis?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends meet a Trainer whose Gym Badges were stolen by Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Serving as a Pokémon League torchbearer, Ash must fend off Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In his first match of the Pokémon League, Ash calls on Krabby to battle.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash battles on the Rock Field and has a run-in with Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: On the Grass Field, Ash has his toughest Pokémon League battle yet.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: It was a stroke of genius, but now the perfect crime is turning into a perfect disaster.

programme.title: That Awkward Moment
programme.desc: When Mikey is dumped by his girlfriend, his best friends Jason and Daniel make a pact to remain single with him until he gets back into the whirlwind of the New York dating game.

programme.title: Youth in Revolt
programme.desc: While his trailer trash parents teeter on the edge of divorce, Nick Twisp sets his sights on dream girl Sheeni Saunders, hoping that she'll be the one to take away his virginity.

programme.title: War, Inc.
programme.desc: In this political satire, a heartless CEO hires a troubled hit man to kill a Middle East oil minister and capitalize on the aftermath. Featuring an ensemble cast including John Cusack, Hilary Duff, Marisa Tomei, Joan Cusack, Dan Aykroyd and more.

programme.title: The Little Vampire
programme.desc: From the screenwriters of Chicken Run and The Addams Family, comes The Little Vampire: a fantastic adventure that you can really sink your teeth into!

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: K-9: Legend of the Lost Gold
programme.desc: When Kassie and her friends stumble across an old, broken pocket watch they begin an unexpected journey to unlock the secret of the legendary Garrison Gold. They'll have to solve riddles and follow clues to find the lost treasure. Kassie is about to go on the adventure of a lifetime!

programme.title: Impy's Wonderland
programme.desc: Impy the friendly little dinosaur and his friends join together in order to rescue their new baby panda.

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship. On Christmas Eve, Mary's Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll…

programme.title: Burning Lies
programme.desc: (2021) Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly.

programme.title: Johnson County War
programme.desc: (2002) Contemporary western with Tom Berenger, Luke Perry and Burt Reynolds. Three brothers are pulled into a fiery conflict between old cowboys and new homesteaders. (1/2)

programme.title: Johnson County War
programme.desc: (2002) Contemporary western with Tom Berenger, Luke Perry and Burt Reynolds. Three brothers are pulled into a fiery conflict between old cowboys and new homesteaders. (2/2)

programme.title: Outlaws and Angels
programme.desc: (2016) Tense western starring Chad Michael Murray and Luke Wilson. A pastor's family home provides the perfect hideout for three violent fugitives. A long night of cat and mouse games beckons...

programme.title: Redemption Day
programme.desc: (2021) Action thriller with Gary Dourdan, Serinda Swan and Andy Garcia. A war hero embarks on a daring rescue mission when his wife is kidnapped. As the clock counts down, can he get to her in time?

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: Locke
programme.desc: LOCKE is the story of one man's life unravelling in a tension-fuelled 90-minute race against time. Ivan Locke has the perfect family, his dream job, and tomorrow should be the crowning moment of his career.

programme.title: Cleaner
programme.desc: Crime thriller starring Samuel L. Jackson as Tom Cutler, a former cop who now works as a professional crime scene cleaner. When he's called to sanitise a suburban home after what appears to be a routine homicide, Tom later discovers he may have unknowingly helped cover up a murder.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: On Sunday November 14, 1965 Lt. Col. Hal Moore and his regiment of 400 men touched down in a place in Vietnam known as "The Valley of Death". They found themselves surrounded by roughly 2,000 North Vietnamese soldiers and the ensuing battle became one of the most savage in US history.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page Conners are a mother-and-daughter con team. Their cunning plan? Max singles out a wealthy man and convinces him to marry her. Once married, Page seduces the unsuspecting groom whilst ensuring Max catches them in the an uncompromising position. Cue divorce proceedings and a large settlement. What could possibly go wrong, except maybe falling in love?

programme.title: Iron Men
programme.desc: Checking out the West Ham United journey as they relocate after over a century at Upton Park. Fans and behind-the-scenes moments capture this big move to their new stadium.

programme.title: The Walking Deceased
programme.desc: When a police officer wakes up in a hospital to find out he is in the middle of a zombie apocalypse, he will do anything to find his family, even sacrifice Twitter. The Walking Deceased is an hilarious spoof of The Walking Dead is about to spread. The story follows a group of survivors from all walks of the apocalypse - an idiotic Sheriff, his belligerent son, four squabbling friends, and a lonely zombie. They all leave their safe hideouts in search of the Safe Haven Ranch, a refuge untouched by the zombie virus.

programme.title: A Patch of Fog
programme.desc: A security guard catches a famous writer/television host shoplifting and blackmails him into becoming friends. He then uses that friendship and the eve of the anniversary of the publication of his most successful novel to manipulate him further.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: Working nine to five is a real killer, but team-building holidays can be even worse. Seven colleagues find themselves faced with the chop when their corporate weekend in the wilds of Eastern Europe descends into a deadly nightmare. Pitched into a fight for survival against a forgotten army of bloodthirsty maniacs, can the Palisade Defence team survive the bear traps and treacherous pits long enough to show their guts instead of losing them?

programme.title: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: A gruesome scene adorns a pier in San Pedro, south of Los Angeles. Twenty-seven dead bodies. A burned-out ship smoldering in the harbor.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie cop is assigned to the 118 Precinct in the same district where he grew up. The Precinct Captain starts receiving letters about two unsolved murders that happened many years ago in the housing projects when the rookie cop was just a kid.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: After his girlfriend's mysterious death, a young man awakens to find strange horns sprouting from his forehead

programme.title: Adventures of a Plumber's Mate
programme.desc: Times are hard for plumber Sid South. Up to his neck in bills, facing eviction from his home and in debt to a violent bookie, he desperately needs to raise some funds or else Sid will be a broken man - literally, as there are two thugs ready to break every bone in his body unless he hands over the cash he owes their boss. It doesn't help that Sid never seems to get paid for any of the work he does, as his occupation lands him in a variety of risqu situations which always end in disaster. Drastic times call for drastic measures, and the browbeaten plumber seeks employment from Dodger, a shady wheeler-dealer who can put some dubious work Sid's way. But, as always, things never seem to go exactly to plan and the beguiled plumber finds himself in further strife.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Gladiatress
programme.desc: 55BC Somewhere In Britain: The Princesses of the Dubonni tribe are three unlikely sisters: Smirgut The Fierce (Fiona Allen), ferocious warrior and full-time mum, Dwyfuc (Doon Mackichan), desperate spinster in search of a hairy husband and Worthaboutapig (Sally Phillips), clumsy village bee-herder. Roman soldiers kidnap Dwyfuc, detaining her in Boulogne. Seduced by Roman society, she reveals locations of British ports crucial to the Romanss invasion strategy. Smirgut and Worthaboutapig set out on a perilous rescue mission together they must prevent the downfall of Celtic Britain, encountering gods, lawyers, soothsayers, barbarians and the Otherworld. Girl power is alive and kicking and ready to take on the Romans

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two astronauts (Dennis Quaid, Vantage Point and Ben Foster, 30 Days of Night) awaken in a hyper-sleep chamber aboard a seemingly abandoned spacecraft. It's pitch black, they are disoriented, and the only sound is a low rumble and creak from the belly of the ship. They can't remember anything like who they are and what their mission is, but one thing they do realise very quickly is that they are not alone. Slowly the spacecraft's shocking, deadly secrets are revealed and the astronauts find that they must fight to stay alive and that their survival is more important than they could ever have imagined. Directed by Christian Alvart and also starring Cam Gigandet (Twilight), Cung Le (Tekken) and newcomer Antje Traue.

programme.title: Imperium
programme.desc: Daniel Radcliffe (Harry Potter) plays Nate, a young FBI agent who goes undercover to expose a radical white supremacy terrorist group. Under a new identity and immersed in a deeply unsettling, hate-filled world, Nate must control his own beliefs whilst identifying the threat and keeping his true motives a secret. Inspired by true events, this compelling story also stars Toni Collette (Hereditary).

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. When he's assigned to escort a petty criminal to testify before the grand jury, a violent turn of events means this down-and-out cop needs to pull it together as he is hunted across New York City.

programme.title: White Mountain
programme.desc: This jaw-dropping climbing, Free Solo-esque documentary is a harrowing story of friendship, bravery and tragedy in one of the harshest environments known to man. 6 years after their trip to Dhaulagiri in the Himalayas to reach the peak of the almost mythical and rarely-climbed white wall, a group of Argentine climbers return to get closure on a fellow climber who was never to be seen again.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Rock-a-doodle
programme.desc: An iconic family favourite from legendary director Don Bluth and featuring the voice of Oscar Winner Christopher Plummer. A contemporary take on the classic fish-out-of-water story as a rooster, who is tricked in to leaving town to seek fame as an Elvis-style Las Vegas singer, teams up with a young boy and a group of barnyard animals on a magical journey to defeat the Grand Duke of Owls.

programme.title: Love at the Lodge
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Megan Elizabeth Barker. Lawyer Emma is promised a promotion if she can persuade Liam to sell his family's country lodge. But is she about to have a conflict of interest?

programme.title: A Country Romance
programme.desc: A woman falls for a handsome local when she returns home to help on her family vineyard. Starring Alix Angelis (2021)

programme.title: Love Takes Flight
programme.desc: Single mum Lizzy has built boundaries at work and personal life to protect herself. After meeting an impulsive pilot, Charlie, at work, will she be open to change and open herself up to love? (2019)

programme.title: Let Love Grow
programme.desc: (2022) Romance starring Jennifer Bonner. Landscape architect Evie is a hit with stubborn new client Ryan's daughters - leading her to realise she's the subject of Operation Grow a Girlfriend!

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Once upon a time, screenwriter Keith Michaels was on top of the world. But now, he's divorced, broke and hasn't written a hit film in years. His attitude slowly begins to turn when he meets Holly, a single mum.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Playing it Cool
programme.desc: A screenwriter working on a script for a romantic movie is having a hard time because he is a little jaded when it comes to love since his mother abandoned him when he was a boy.

programme.title: Tell It to the Bees
programme.desc: When mill worker Lydia is abandoned by her philandering husband, she struggles to look after herself and her son Charlie. Local doctor Jean is one of the few to help and a friendship develops that blossoms into a romance that will scandalise the town.

programme.title: Radio Rebel
programme.desc: Tara Adams is just an ordinary high school junior, except for one little thing. Tara has a secret identity-she's Radio Rebel, the most popular radio DJ in Seattle.

programme.title: Sincerely, Yours Truly
programme.desc: When Hayley finds a wedding ring with a letter hidden in a drawer in her new condo, she decides to write back… and the mysterious lover replies, starting a chain of letters and events that will change her life for ever!

programme.title: You Stupid Man
programme.desc: A writer struggles to deal with the break-up with his girlfriend. It does not help with getting her out of his mind that she recently became a famous TV start.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Love, Rosie is a heart-warming, modern comedy-of-errors about Rosie and Alex. As each navigates the complexities of life, love, and everything in between, they always find their way back to each other - but is it just friendship, or something more?

programme.title: Conversations with Other Women
programme.desc: When a man and woman flirt with each other at a wedding reception, the sexual tension seems spontaneous. As they break from the party to a hotel room, the flirtation turns into a night filled with passion and remorse.

programme.title: Prescription For Love
programme.desc: Claire, a nurse, fights for a chance at love with a charming new doctor and for a promotion to free herself from the misery her supervisor creates. As her supervisor tries to derail Claire's chance at happiness, Claire will have to stand up for herself and go after her dreams.

programme.title: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: High-school Ag Science teacher Jodi Stafford meets commercial real-estate marketing specialist Mike Jared during her struggle to save her family's ailing dairy farm.

programme.title: Finding Love In Mountain View
programme.desc: After learning she's been entrusted to take care of her deceased cousin's children, an architect is torn between focusing on her career and honoring her cousin's wish.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Ice Road Killer
programme.desc: During a road trip, a mother and her teenage daughter pick up a young hitchhiker.

programme.title: Celebrity Sex
programme.desc: CA girl turns NY hedge fund VP, starts escort service, risks scandal.

programme.title: The Wrong Cruise
programme.desc: Mother, daughter bond on cruise, fall for passengers, face trouble ashore.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake takes pregnant Lindsey to a resort, where they find his soon to be ex-wife.

programme.title: Ice Road Killer
programme.desc: During a road trip, a mother and her teenage daughter pick up a young hitchhiker.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Love on Trend
programme.desc: A fashion blogger gets a new number and steps into a glamorous life, but falls for her predecessor's ex.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is hosting a 90210 themed party and wants to create some classic Beverly Hills appys.

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: A writer returns to her hometown for inspiration and reinkindles her romance with her first love.

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: The Longest Yard (2005)
programme.desc: Prison inmates form a football team to challenge the prison guards.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Promise
programme.desc: Ransom, a retired scout, must face his tragic past to find peace. Seeking answers about his lost love Tess and her daughter Promise, he learns of a hidden cash box tied to his past. As ex-Confederates and the dangerous Wildeye hunt for the treasure, Ransom and Promise join forces, navigating gunfights, betrayal, and an intense showdown.

programme.title: Stagecoach (1939)
programme.desc: A group of people traveling on a stagecoach find their journey complicated by the threat of Geronimo and learn something about each other in the process.

programme.title: King of the Pecos
programme.desc: Profiteer Alexander Stiles wants a million acres in Pecos River country, but rancher Claybor refuses to sell Sweetwater. When Claybor and his wife are murdered by Stiles' hired guns, their son John survives and flees to Austin, where a new chapter of revenge and justice begins.

programme.title: Day of the Outlaw
programme.desc: Blaise Starrett is a rancher at odds with homesteaders when outlaws hold up the small town.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: The Hideout
programme.desc: An insurance investigator has a chance encounter with the sister of a fur dealer.

programme.title: The Embezzler
programme.desc: An elderly bank clerk with only two years to live absconds with the contents of a bank safe.

programme.title: Constant Husband
programme.desc: An Englishman wakes in a hotel bedroom suffering from amnesia and sets out to find his identity. He tracks down his wife but soon learns that the job she saw him leave for every morning did not exist. He learns to his disgust that that is the least of his lies. He is a cad and bigamist (or, worse, he has seven wives and identities). His female lawyer tries to keep him out of jail, though he prefers incarceration to multiple matrimony.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier and Vivien Leigh star as Lord Nelson and Lady Hamilton.

programme.title: Folly to Be Wise
programme.desc: When Captain Paris takes over at a big army camp as Chaplain and Entertainments Officer, the troops are in for some surprises. Captain Paris finds the Garrison Theatre ill attended, as the troops favor the local hostelries in preference to the succession of feminine string quartets and madrigal singers hitherto engaged for their amusement. Paris sets out to remedy this sad state of affairs, but his idea of staging a Brains Trust with local celebrities as the 'brains' turns out to have disastrous results!

programme.title: Only God Knows Everything
programme.desc: Dowoon, orphaned and raised by a priest, is ordained as a priest. In the confessional, he hears that his mother was murdered and an evil group reveals itself.

programme.title: The Blood of Desire
programme.desc: A modern retelling of “The Tale of the Turtle and the Hare”! “Jara,” a local thug struggling to make ends meet, is presented with an unexpected opportunity one day. He is ordered to bring back a “Rabbit” for a liver transplant for “Dragon King,” the boss of the “Dragon Palace Gang.” But he soon discovers that the “Rabbit” is actually his childhood friend and savior… Torn between friendship and ambition, the time has come for “Turtle” to make a choice.

programme.title: The Daechi Scandal
programme.desc: Daechi, the place with the most enthusiasm for academia in Korea. 'Yunim' who once dreamed of becoming a novelist lives out her life as a Korean instructor in Daechi. However, on the day the midterm exam is about to end on the middle school where Yunim is in charge of, the teacher of that school comes visiting Yunim. The schoolteacher 'Kihaeng' is Yunim's ex-boyfriend 10 years ago. Now, the two becomes the topic of gossip among the parents of Daechi.

programme.title: Perfect Game
programme.desc: Two friends who threw their dreams at a world. CHOI Dong-won and SUN Dong-yeol's solitary yet intense matchup!

programme.title: Jazzy Misfits
programme.desc: Sun-deok is visited by her mother abruptly. And She finds her younger sister had vanished with their savings.

programme.title: Very Ordinary Couple
programme.desc: Former couple goes tit for tat after a bitter break up going into a deeper spiral of love and hate.

programme.title: Mothers
programme.desc: A 32-year-old widow Hyo Jin is suddenly faced with a situation of raising her ex-husband's 16-year-old son Jong Wook.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage stars in KNOWING, a gripping action-thriller of global proportions about a professor who stumbles on terrifying predictions about the future and sets out to prevent them from coming true. Rose Byrne and Lara Robinson also star in director Alex Proyas' riveting feature.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Thrown into the high-stakes world of corporate espionage, Morgan (Jeremy Northam), a disenchanted accountant turned spy, teams up with a mysterious colleague (Lucy Liu) on a mission to protect themselves from their ruthless boss.

programme.title: Black Water
programme.desc: When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative joins forces with another prisoner to break free. Stars Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dolph Lundgren (2018)

programme.title: Mystery 101: An Education in Murder
programme.desc: Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a young writer reopens an old case, a determined professor races to prove her colleague's innocence - before the truth is buried for good.

programme.title: Staged Killer
programme.desc: When a former co-host works his way back into the life of popular TV host Naomi Spencer, the show's success skyrockets, but Naomi's personal life begins to fall apart. Starring Chrishell Stause (2019)

programme.title: Cheer Squad Secrets
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller with Anita Brown. After her daughter becomes cheerleading captain, a woman is horrified to find that someone is giving the girl steroids - and will do anything to cover their tracks.

programme.title: The Cat's Meow
programme.desc: In 1924, media mogul William Randolph Hearst gathered some of the world's best known personalities for a trip of his yacht that resulted in a still-unsolved, hushed-up murder.

programme.title: Anatomy of a Fall
programme.desc: When her husband Samuel is mysteriously found dead in the snow below their secluded chalet, Sandra becomes the main suspect when the police begin to question whether he fell or was pushed.

programme.title: 13 Sins
programme.desc: Elliot Brindle is an ordinary office worker who's bright, bored and drowning in debt. He receives a phone call informing him that he's on a hidden camera game show, where he must execute 13 tasks to receive a sum total cash prize of $6.2M...

programme.title: Miss Sloane
programme.desc: Elizabeth Sloane (Jessica Chastain – Zero Dark Thirty) is the most sought-after, formidable and ruthless lobbyist in D.C.

programme.title: Faux Fox
programme.desc: When Nigel is charmed by brilliant student Lorraine to show her their offices (and kiss), a burglar knocks out Sidney, but what was robbed?

programme.title: Pandoras Box
programme.desc: Sidney inherits from the best relic hunter of the previous generation a key and rushes with Nigel on the hunt for the one treasure he never found: Pandora's box.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: Bekkastan, 1401 AD: warrior princess Kahina proves her right to rule. 2002: Sydney and Nigel unearth a cave painting that might lead them to Kahina's Saddle. But her descendants cause complications.

programme.title: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: While Nigel rehearses his keynote speech in a Seville hotel room, a girl nearly breaks his nose demanding something - it turns out she was after the water from the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Arthurs Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard calls Sidney and Nigel to identify a 5th century murder weapon. It turns out to be the burial cross of King Arthur, but besides the victim several others are looking for it.

programme.title: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: When Sidney and Nigel are about to enter the site of a Bristol lecture, a young author approaches them to follow up immediately on a tip about a map to the lost keys to the druid cult in Stonehenge.

programme.title: Buddhas Bowl
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Nepal to recover Buddha's fabled overflowing alms bowl for villagers who are building a shrine to the original Buddha.

programme.title: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: When Sydney's plane crashes, she's asked by a group of nuns to find the head of another nun who was decapitated several centuries ago.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Angelina Jolie stars in Columbia Pictures' Salt, a contemporary espionage thriller. Before becoming a CIA officer, Evelyn Salt (Jolie) swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture, protect her husband, and stay one step ahead of her colleagues at the CIA.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: It's the song that brings ultimate hope to so many...often in the midst of life s most challenging moments.

programme.title: The sea of trees
programme.desc: Arthur Brennan treks into Aokigahara, known as The Sea of Trees, a mysterious dense forest at the base of Japan's Mount Fuji where people go to commit suicide.

programme.title: Diggers
programme.desc: Paul Rudd and Sarah Paulson star in this coming-of-age story following four working-class friends growing up in The Hamptons, New York, as clam diggers in 1976, following in the footsteps of their fathers and grandfathers.

programme.title: Lonely Hearts
programme.desc: In this thrilling crime drama, two homicide detectives track down Martha Beck and Raymond Martinez Fernandez, a murderous pair known as the "Lonely Hearts Killers." Starring Salma Hayek, John Travolta, James Gandolfini, Jared Leto and more.

programme.title: Pressed
programme.desc: Seeing no other option, Brian decides to go all in and invests his remaining savings into a short-term drug deal, promised to yield the funds necessary to preserve his high-flying lifestyle.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, John Cusack and Jason Patric face off in this action-packed thriller. A retired assassin is drawn back into the life he gave up when his daughter is kidnapped. To rescue her, he must confront his former rival.

programme.title: Hyena Road
programme.desc: Three different men, three different worlds, three different wars – all stand at the crossroads of modern warfare. It's a murky world in which they must save lives - but all is not as it seems

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: Martin Parker (Scott Adkins), a highly trained former DEA agent, is hiding in the witness protection program in London with his young daughter, Carly. His world is turned upside down when a group of thugs break into his home looking for hidden contraband.
